snippet.title: To Be Honest 2.0 | Mathira | Tabish Hashmi | Full Episode | Nashpati Prime
snippet.description:
Mathira Mohammad aka Mathira is a Pakistani model, dancer, television hostess, singer and actress. She has hosted several television shows and appeared in music videos shares her journey with our host Tabish Hashmi in 'To Be Honest 2.0' - A juicy and fun gossip show with TV, Film and Digital Celebrities.

Nashpati Prime is an entertainment platform focused on producing premium quality content for our viewers.

Host: Tabish Hashmi
Guest:  Mathira Mohammad

Created by: Azfar Ali
Produced by: Qaiser Ali

Associate Producer: Mohammad Raheel 
Set design by: Zain Mursaleen
Tabish Wardrobe: Custom Cut
Official Photography: Justin George (Jeem G Vision)

Strategic Partner: https://rinstra.com/

#TBH #ToBeHonest #Mathira #TBH #ToBeHonest #TabishHashmi #NashpatiPrime #Nashpati #NashpatiDigital

Follow us 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Nashpatiprimeofficial/
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/Nashpati.prime
Twitter: https://twitter.com/NashpatiPrime

snippet.title: AFSANAY - Young Stunners | Talhah Yunus | Talha Anjum | Prod. By Jokhay (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
#YoungStunners​ #TalhahYunus​ #TalhaAnjum​ #Jokhay​ #Afsanay​ 

Official Video from the EP ‘A Tale of Two Talhas’

Written and Performed by Talhah Yunus & Talha Anjum
Music Produced, Mixed & Mastered by Jokhay 

Directed & Produced by Abdul Wali Baloch
Co Directed by Mahad Ali Sajid & Talhah Yunus
DOP/Edit/VFX/Colorist: Mahad Ali Sajid

snippet.title: Size Zero (2021) NEW RELEASED Full Hindi Dubbed South Movie | Anushka Shetty, Arya & Prakash Raj
snippet.description:
Soundarya aka Sweety is an overweight, brave and an independent woman. She is slightly conscious about her weight but does not let it affect her. She falls in love with Abhishek, who was once a prospective groom for her but they both reject each other. However, both Sweety and Abhi continue to remain friends and together take on the Wight Loss clinics Mafia, Sathyanand (Prakash Raj).

StarCast:- Anushka Shetty, Arya, Prakash Raj, Sonal Chauhan

snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

snippet.description:

Singer - Neha Kakkar
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Babbu
Music arranged & produced by Rajat Nagpal 
Guitars Shomu Seal 
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap

Featuring - Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Co-Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar 
Assistant Choreographer- Robin Singh
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
VFX - Prathmesh Chaukekar​ ,Prathmesh Sampada Parab 
Art Director - Karma Art Studio

Neha's team:
Styled by - Outro  By Akshita & Anulika
Make-up - Ritika Vats
Hair by - Rita Shukla
Photo by - Piyush Mehra
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital



Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna



#NehaKakkar #RubinaDilaik #AbhinavShukla

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 07 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 19th Mar 2021
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 07 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 19th March 2021

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :
Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother

Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal
Momina Iqbal as Naheed

snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 06 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 19th Mar 21

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

snippet.title: Mystery Behind The White Mask | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

There is some serious hullabaloo going on in a Locality. A family comes over in search of a new house. As they look at the place, they get warned by an old man of not staying here. Then Team CID comes to have a look at the Spot. ACP Pradyuman along with the others hatches a plan. There he comes face to face with the Strategist. But will this faceoff lead to something serious? watch full episode.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 05 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 12th Mar 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 05 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 12th Mar 21

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

snippet.title: Tapu Sena Ki Masti | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | Tapu Sena Special | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

More Useful Links :
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/tmkoc.sabtv
* Follow us on Instagram : http://www.instagram.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmahnfp
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/tmkoc_ntf
* Visit us at : http://www.tmkoc.com

snippet.title: 33 Useful Life Hacks For Smart PARENTS
snippet.description:
If your kids have been giving you a hard time lately, we sympathize with you. Being a parent is not an easy task, but it’s so rewarding! So, today we have some hacks we want to share with you to give you a helping hand. You’ll learn a few quick fixes for everyday problems, DIY versions of necessary devices, and cute ideas for outfits. Toddlers can be sneaky and quick, so we have a DIY playpen you can use to keep them in one place while during playtime.

Not knowing what to wear can be a huge time-drainer. So we’ll show you an awesome hack to help you save time when getting your little ones ready. No baby monitor? No problem! You can use your tablet and your phone to set up a monitoring system to keep an eye on your kiddos. Ironing mishaps can happen you anyone, but that burned shirt might make a great kiddie apron!

TIMESTAMPS:

1:10 – DIY playpen
4:43 – Outfit organizer
7:34 – Tablet and phone baby monitor
10:36 – DIY apron
11:53 – DIY tutu

We advise adult supervision and care at all times.

This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. localized.title: 33 Useful Life Hacks For Smart PARENTS
localized.description:
If your kids have been giving you a hard time lately, we sympathize with you. Being a parent is not an easy task, but it’s so rewarding! So, today we have some hacks we want to share with you to give you a helping hand. You’ll learn a few quick fixes for everyday problems, DIY versions of necessary devices, and cute ideas for outfits. Toddlers can be sneaky and quick, so we have a DIY playpen you can use to keep them in one place while during playtime.

Not knowing what to wear can be a huge time-drainer. So we’ll show you an awesome hack to help you save time when getting your little ones ready. No baby monitor? No problem! You can use your tablet and your phone to set up a monitoring system to keep an eye on your kiddos. Ironing mishaps can happen you anyone, but that burned shirt might make a great kiddie apron!

TIMESTAMPS:

1:10 – DIY playpen
4:43 – Outfit organizer
7:34 – Tablet and phone baby monitor
10:36 – DIY apron
11:53 – DIY tutu

We advise adult supervision and care at all times.

snippet.title: Aik Qaum, Aik Manzil | Pakistan Day Song | 23rd March 2021 | ISPR
snippet.description:
On 23rd March 1940, Muslims of the Sub-Continent, while exhibiting heights of unity, faith and discipline, passed the historic Resolution for establishment of a separate homeland. 
Muslims shared one vision and were always one in their resolve against all odds.
The song; Aik Qaum, Aik Manzil, highlights the very same ideology of unity, resilience and an indomitable resolve of Pakistanis, 81 years later. 
Compassion, tolerance, brotherhood and the feeling of oneness is the essence, which consolidates Pakistan into one nation, despite being a multi-cultural, multi-ethnic and a multi-religious society.
Renowned singers, Ali Zafar and Aima Baig, have put their heart and soul into this song. 

Credits:-
Singers: Ali Zafar and Aima baig 
Lyricist: Abid Hassan
Composition: Ali Zafar 
Music Producer: Sarmad Ghafoor
Post Production: Mazhar Hussain

#PakistanDay
#23rdMarch2021
#OneNationOneDestiny
#AikQaumAikManzil

snippet.title: Hyundai Elantra 2021 | First Look Review | PakWheels
snippet.description:
Hyundai Nishat Motors has finally launched the much-awaited sedan, the Hyundai Elantra. Elantra is Hyundai’s second car in Pakistan, after Hyundai Tucson. Hyundai Pakistan has launched the 6th generation of Elantra in one variant, GLS. The company will hopefully introduce more variants in the future.
The company has added the price tag of 4,049,000 rupees on its first sedan car, which is almost the same as its direct competitors, Corolla and Civic, but almost double the price of Alsvin. Bookings for Elantra open today the 22nd of March. 

👉Find specs & feature: https://www.pakwheels.com/new-cars/hyundai/elantra/

snippet.title: माधुरी ने छोड़ा अपना घर | Prem Granth | Part 02 | Madhuri Dixit | Om Puri
snippet.description:
Professionally qualified as a lawyer, Somen lives a wealthy lifestyle with his mom, Parvati, and dad, Dharam Bhushan, who presides over the town of Shripuri as an upper caste Hindu Priest. During the Dassera fest, Somen meets a village belle, Kajri, and falls in love with her despite of the fact that she is of a much lower caste. After seeking his mom's permission, he goes to bring Kajri to meet her, but finds out that she has left for an unknown destination. Unable to stand his dad's hypocrisy, Somen leaves home to go to the city but is unable to get Kajri out of his mind. Will Somen ever find out where Kajri is?

YOR - 1996
Star Cast – Rishi Kapoor, Madhuri Dixit, Shammi Kapoor, Om Puri, Anupam Kher, Prem Chopra, Reema Lagoo
Director – Rajeev Kapoor
Producer –  Rajeev Kapoor, Randhir Kapoor, Rishi Kapoor
Cinematographer - Jai Mistry
Music Director –  Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist – Anand Bakshi
Writer - Jainendra Jain
Editor - Rajeev Kapoor

snippet.description:
Bismillah ..... Salam Ya Hussain .....

Hussain Hai Naa | Mir Hasan Mir | New Manqabat 2021 | 3 Shaban Manqabat | Imam Hussain Manqabat 2021

Recited By | Mir Hasan Mir
Poet | Hasnain Akber - Mir Takallum
Composition | Raza Shah 
Audio | Ods
Master and Mixing | ODS Karachi
Video | TNA
Creatives | SAR Creative - Alamdar Rizvi
Translation | Molana Haider Sheerazi

#MurshadHussainHai ‪‎#MirHasanMirManqbat2021​​​​ #3ShabanManqabat2021​

|Watch More Videos|

►Hussain Hai Naa
https://youtu.be/_CLpyrYu4g4

►Hussain Bant Rahai Hain Nijaat Lai Jao
https://youtu.be/FOfyi8d7bLI​

►Kaise Milta Hai Khuda
https://youtu.be/7hTpKfaoioQ​

_/LATEST ALBUMS\_
► Play Lists HERE :-

ALBUUM 2020 Manqabat 
► https://bit.ly/38FhUlS​
ALBUUM 2019 Manqabat
► https://bit.ly/2NZY9ht​​​
ALBUUM 2018 Manqabat
► https://bit.ly/2TjCx0F​​​​
ALBUM 2017 Manqabat
► https://goo.gl/35g3Gk​​​​
ALBUM 2016 Manqabat
► https://goo.gl/nT1ZVK​​​​
ALBUM 2015 Manqabat
► https://goo.gl/az7uFz​​​​
ALBUM 2014 Manqabat
► https://goo.gl/ktyoe4​​​​
ALBUM 2013 Manqabat
► https://goo.gl/BQ2w8g​

****************************

●● MANQABAT LYRICS ●● 


●Mera Aqa, Mera Maula, Mera Sa'een, Mera Daata
Mera Murshad, Mera Malik, Mera Qibla, Mera Ka'baa

●Ya Hussain!

●Ye Dunya ho ya woh Dunya, Mera Maula Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

●Maula Maula mere, Maula Maula Mere, Mere Maula, Mere Maula

●Noke sina pe tu ne Quran sunaya he
La ilaha ill-Allah ko tu ne bachaya he
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula

●Avaaz ye kalma deta he, mera kalma Hussain he!
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

●Lawh-o-Qalam ka Malik, Zahra ka laal he
Fitrus ka istekhara, Rahib ka faal he
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Hur ne ye kaha milta he Khuda, jise milta Hussain he

●Kar midhate Hussain, issi me nijaat he
Dunya e be-sabaat ka in se sabaat he
Be ayb Haq ki zaat he, ya in ki zaat he
Hukm inka aur kalam-e-majeed ek baat he
Us manzil e niyaaz ke Salik Hussain he
Jab tak Khuda ka Mulk he, Malik Hussain he
Sarkar e Dabeer ne farmaya, mera Maula Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

●Maula Maula mere, Maula Maula Mere, Mere Maula, Mere Maula

●Arfe diye riwayat, Sattar hazaar hajj,
Ehram kale paa ke, Kaynde zawar ajj
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Az karbobala de HajiyaaN, Sada Makkah Hussain ay
Mera Murshad Hussain ay, Mera Malik Hussain ay

●Rang o nasal di koi, tafreek na rayi
Matam di saff te aa ke, koi bhi ghayr nayi
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Sada matamdar qabila ay, sada rishta Hussain ay
Mera Murshad Hussain ay, Mera Malik Hussain ay

●Maula Maula mere, Maula Maula Mere, Mere Maula, Mere Maula

●Karam Hussain ka mujh par mazeed ho jaye
Marun jo farsh e aza par toh Eid ho jaye
Ajeeb jazba he har Maa du'aaein karti he
Khuda kare mera bachha shaheed ho jaye
Har maa ne kaha mera baccha, tera sadqa Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

●Dunya me Shah ka sajda sajdon ka taaj he
Nabiyon ke sab sajdon par is ka hi raaj he
Khud khana e kaaba kehta he mera Qibla Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

●Maula Maula mere, Maula Maula Mere, Mere Maula, Mere Maula

●In jayse kitne tere Ashiq mazeed hein
Khwaja, Bhittai, Baahu tere mureed hein
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Jisse Laal Qalandar kehte hein tera banda Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

●Mere dil ke andar Hussain, Hussain
Mere ruh ka mehvar Hussain, Hussain
Dosh-e-Nabi ka sawaar he
Wo naaz parwardigaar he
Fatima ka chayn he
Woh Nabi ka Noor e ayn he
Woh Ba-Khuda Hussain he

●Jera Nabi da pyara Zahra da chayn ay
Waris wasila saada bass o Hussain ay
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula

●Akbar, te Takallum kende ne
Sanu denda Hussain ay
Bolo bolo jhulay Laal Qalandar mast
Jivay sa'eeyaaN, jivay sa'eeyyaaN
Laal Qalandar jhule, Jhule murshid sakhi
Tere mere ishq qalandar, Laal qalandar jivay
Dama-dam Mast qaladar, Sakhi

●Noor aur noori qabila tera
Hasan Hussain wasila tera
Waliyon ka sardar, jivay sa'eeyyaaN
Laal Qalandar jhule, Jhule murshid sakhi
Tere mere ishq qalandar, Laal qalandar jivay
Dama-dam Mast qaladar, Sakhi
Haye Murshad Laal Sakhi

****************************

snippet.title: PDM Se Hath Karnay Kay Bad Asif Ali Zardari | Hasb e Haal | Dunya News | HI2L
snippet.description:
PDM Se Hath Karnay Kay Bad Asif Ali Zardari | Hasb e Haal | Dunya News | HI2L

snippet.title: Hussain Hai Naa | Mir Hasan Mir | New Manqabat 2021 | 3 Shaban Manqabat | Imam Hussain Manqabat 2021
snippet.description:
Bismillah ..... Salam Ya Hussain .....

Hussain Hai Naa | Mir Hasan Mir | New Manqabat 2021 | 3 Shaban Manqabat | Imam Hussain Manqabat 2021

Manqabat Title | ☆ HUSSAIN (as) HAI NAA ☆
Recited By | Mir Hasan Mir
Poet | Mir Takallum
Composition | Ustad Nazakat Ali Khan 
Special Thanks | Ali Hamza
Audio | MS Studio- Mehdi
Master and Mixing | ODS Karachi
Video | TNA
Video Edit | Zeeshan Syed
Creatives | SAR Creative - Alamdar Rizvi
Translation | Molana Haider Sheerazi

#HussainHaiNaa​ ‪‎#MirHasanMirManqbat2021​​​ #3ShabanManqabat2021

|Watch More Videos|

►Hussain Bant Rahai Hain Nijaat Lai Jao
https://youtu.be/FOfyi8d7bLI

►Kaise Milta Hai Khuda
https://youtu.be/7hTpKfaoioQ

_/LATEST ALBUMS\_
► Play Lists HERE :-

ALBUUM 2020 Manqabat 
► https://bit.ly/38FhUlS
ALBUUM 2019 Manqabat
► https://bit.ly/2NZY9ht​​
ALBUUM 2018 Manqabat
► https://bit.ly/2TjCx0F​​​
ALBUM 2017 Manqabat
► https://goo.gl/35g3Gk​​​
ALBUM 2016 Manqabat
► https://goo.gl/nT1ZVK​​​
ALBUM 2015 Manqabat
► https://goo.gl/az7uFz​​​
ALBUM 2014 Manqabat
► https://goo.gl/ktyoe4​​​
ALBUM 2013 Manqabat
► https://goo.gl/BQ2w8g

****************************

●● MANQABAT LYRICS ●● 

●Hussain hai na

●Khuda Se Kehne Lagi Yeh Zehra
Hussain Hai Naa

●Teri Shariat Ko Kaisa Khatra
Hussain Hai Naa

●Kaha khuda ne rasool jao
Jahan ko yeh asool dedo
Hussain jab tak bhi pusht pe hai
Tum apne sajdon ko tool dedo
Tumhara sajdaa.... Bacha rahega
Hussain Hai Naa

●Khayal choton ka kis tarha se
Baron ne rakha hai yeh batana
Rasool zer e kisa thy jis dam
Hassan ne zehra ne murtaza ne 
Thaher ke pehle.... Nabi se pucha
Hussain Hai Naa

●Jo dekha maathe pe daag e sajda
Tou sheikh se boli unki zoja
Janab sub kheriat to hai na
Taweel itna Kiya hai sajdaa
Wo bole jal ker....Aray wo bacha
Hussain Hai Naa

●Ulatdi nanni si aastine
Qamar mai rumal uski bandha
Nazar utari nazar se apni
Ali ki beti ne phir yeh bola
Rabab Dekho..... tumhara beta
Hussain Hai Naa

●Khuda se Zainab Ka tha yeh waada
Yazeed jitna bhi dam laga le
Azan hogi namaz hogi
Wo chahe no lakh ko bula le
Gira sakega.....na tera Kaaba
Hussain Hai Naa

●Jalal Mai jab Ali Ka beta
Chala Jo taigh e Ali ko tole
Ajeeb baghdar thi Karbala mai
Sawar ik dusre se bole
Tere bhi peche.....are batana
Hussain Hai Naa

●Na wo kisi se hua hai paida
Na koi bhi use hoga paida
Ye shart touheed hai nuseri
Bata ke ab tera Kiya banega
Tere khuda ka...to aik beta
Hussain hai na

●Wo sub balaaon ko taal dega
Wo  mushkilon se nikal dega
Khilaf chahe ho sari dunya
Wo khud akaila sambhal lega
Ali ke shion....tumhara maula
Hussain hai na

●Udaas betha hai kyun musalman
Nahi ager Haj ki istetahat
To jaa abhi Karbala Chala jaa
Khuloos se dil mai karke niyat
Bagair Haj bhi....Tu haaji hoga
Hussain hai na

●Khuda ki izzat rakhi hai jis ne
Milegi mujh ko wahin se izzat
Uthalo dolat uthalo sohrat
Nahi taqallum ko Kuch zarurat
Haseen dunya.....Ka Kia karunga
Hussain hai na

●● MANQABAT LYRICS ●● 

●Hussain hai na

●Khuda Se Kehne Lagi Yeh Zehra
Hussain Hai Naa

●Teri Shariat Ko Kaisa Khatra
Hussain Hai Naa

●Kaha khuda ne rasool jao
Jahan ko yeh asool dedo
Hussain jab tak bhi pusht pe hai
Tum apne sajdon ko tool dedo
Tumhara sajdaa.... Bacha rahega
Hussain Hai Naa

●Khayal choton ka kis tarha se
Baron ne rakha hai yeh batana
Rasool zer e kisa thy jis dam
Hassan ne zehra ne murtaza ne 
Thaher ke pehle.... Nabi se pucha
Hussain Hai Naa

●Jo dekha maathe pe daag e sajda
Tou sheikh se boli unki zoja
Janab sub kheriat to hai na
Taweel itna Kiya hai sajdaa
Wo bole jal ker....Aray wo bacha
Hussain Hai Naa

●Ulatdi nanni si aastine
Qamar mai rumal uski bandha
Nazar utari nazar se apni
Ali ki beti ne phir yeh bola
Rabab Dekho..... tumhara beta
Hussain Hai Naa

●Khuda se Zainab Ka tha yeh waada
Yazeed jitna bhi dam laga le
Azan hogi namaz hogi
Wo chahe no lakh ko bula le
Gira sakega.....na tera Kaaba
Hussain Hai Naa

●Jalal Mai jab Ali Ka beta
Chala Jo taigh e Ali ko tole
Ajeeb baghdar thi Karbala mai
Sawar ik dusre se bole
Tere bhi peche.....are batana
Hussain Hai Naa

●Na wo kisi se hua hai paida
Na koi bhi use hoga paida
Ye shart touheed hai nuseri
Bata ke ab tera Kiya banega
Tere khuda ka...to aik beta
Hussain hai na

●Wo sub balaaon ko taal dega
Wo  mushkilon se nikal dega
Khilaf chahe ho sari dunya
Wo khud akaila sambhal lega
Ali ke shion....tumhara maula
Hussain hai na

●Udaas betha hai kyun musalman
Nahi ager Haj ki istetahat
To jaa abhi Karbala Chala jaa
Khuloos se dil mai karke niyat
Bagair Haj bhi....Tu haaji hoga
Hussain hai na

●Khuda ki izzat rakhi hai jis ne
Milegi mujh ko wahin se izzat
Uthalo dolat uthalo sohrat
Nahi taqallum ko Kuch zarurat
Haseen dunya.....Ka Kia karunga
Hussain hai na

India Alert Ep: 491 Bahu, Sasur aur Woh
This episode of India Alert the #story revolves around a senior person named Brij. Who was salacious by nature and due to this he forced on her daughter-in-law Mansha. She managed to escape him and called her #husband to inform about it. Her husband  rushed towards #home but he had an accident and before dying he takes vows from her #wife that she will never disclose his father's reality. She agreed. Now, will Brij think avail to advantage of her lonliness. To know more, watch the full episode of "India Alert" only on Dangal Tv Channel.

बहु, ससुर और वो | नया एपिसोड - 491

snippet.title: Madhuri Dixit’s Hair Care Routine | Madhuri Dixit Nene
snippet.description:
Hi guys, welcome back to my channel! In today’s video I’m talking about my hair care routine and also giving you guys some tips and tricks that I use for my hair care. snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: MESUM ABBAS - NEW MANQABAT 2021 | Chalte Chalte | 3 Shaban
snippet.description:
Chalte Chalte (Official Video) - Mesum Abbas New Manqabat 2021

“MAIN SUAY KARBALA JARAHA THA...”

Listen to The 1st Ever Manqabat for Mola Imam Hussain (as) by Mesum Abbas 2021.

"Karbala Chalte Chalte”

Lyrics:

Mai Suye Karbala Jaa Raha Tha Parhta Salle Ala Chalte Chalte
Peeraha Tha Mawadat Ke Saaghar, Araha Tha Maza... Chalte Chalte...

1. Shahe Karbobala Ki Ziyarat Karne Nikla Tha Mai Apne Gharse
Jo Qaza Hogayeen Theen Namaze, Hogayeen Vo Ada... Chalte Chalte...

2. Kuch Qadam Hur Barha Sheh Ki Jaanib, Kuch Qadam Sheh Barhe Hur Ki Jaanib
Bakhshdi Chand Lamhon Mai Sheh Ne, Hur Ki Saari Khata... Chalte Chalte...

3. Bughz e Haider The Seene May Jiske, Vo Tawaf e Haram Kar Raha Tha
Aayi Taqdeer Chakkar Mai Aisi, Seedha Dozakh Gaya... Chalte Chalte...

4. Shahe Konain Zainab Ke Bhai, Tumne Tauheed Aise Bachayi
Dhoondne Nikla Jo Bhi Khuda Ko, Agaya Karbala... Chalte Chalte...

5. Ae Yazeed Ab Tujhe Qaid Karne, Tauq o Zanjeer Bairi Uthaye
Dekh Shair e Ilahi Ka Beta, Shaam Tak Agaya... Chalte Chalte...

6. Horahi Thi Dhamak Is Bala Ki, Ruk Gayeen Saansain Ahle Jafa Ki
Karke Dhak Dhak Vilayi Ke Dil Ne, Aisa Matam Kiya... Chalte Chalte...

7. Fakhr Se Bolay Gohar Se Mesum, Har Ghari Har Nafas Dam Hamadam
Jhoom Utheygi Saari Khudayi, Vo Karainge Sana... Chalte Chalte...

CHALTE CHALTE - Mesum Abbas | Manqabat Imam Hussain | 2021
Reciter: Mesum Abbas Naqvi 
Poet: Gohar Jarchvi
Arrangement: M. Aamir Qureshi & Rizwan Mirza
Backing Vocals: Rizwan Mirza - Mesum Abbas
Audio Recordist: M. Ovais Qureshi (ODS - Karachi)
Mixed & Mastered: M. Omar Qureshi 
DOP: Saroj B. 
Editor & Post Production: Ali Arman Baltistani (TNA Productions)
Cover Design: Yawer Damani
Sarparast: Syed Baqar Naqvi
Translation: Ahmed Virani (USA)
Special Thanks: Faculty Princeton University, New Jersey

snippet.title: Puaada | Official Trailer | Ammy Virk | Sonam Bajwa | 2nd April | Punjabi Movie 2021
snippet.description:
Presenting the official trailer of the upcoming Punjabi Rom-Com #Puaada starring Ammy Virk, Sonam Bajwa. This film is directed by Rupinder Chahal and produced by Atul Bhalla, Pawan Gill, Anurag Singh, Aman Gill, Balwinder Singh Janjua. Puaada also stars  Anita Devgan, Hardeep Gill, Seema Kaushal, Sukhwinder Singh Chahal, Nisha Bano, Gurpreet Bhangu, Prakash Gadhu, Sukhwinder Raj, Mintu Kappa, Honey Mattu.
Co-Producer – Aditya Shastri
Story & Screenplay – Balwinder Singh Janjua, Rupinder Chahal, Anil Rodhan
Additional Screenplay & Dialogues – Rakesh Dhawan
Director of Photography – Anshul Choubey
Editor – Manish More

snippet.title: Master Ji Ka Bhoot - Amit Bhadana
snippet.description:
Do badmash students ne kar rakha hai apne master ji ki naak mein dum aur is duniya mein nahi hai unka koi bhi ilaaj. Par kya karenge vo dono jab master ji dosari duniya se mangne ayenge jawaab? Is kahani mein hum aapko parlok ki sair karayenge, thoda sa darr lagega par bahut sara hansayenge. Masterji ki class mein attendance lagao aur bakiyon ko bhi le kar aao.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3122 - Full Episode - 15th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3122: 
-----------------------
While Gokuldham members enter the society gate dancing, Chalu Pandey sees them and makes them stop because Bhogilal had called him and filed a false complaint against Jethalal. Chalu Pandey questions Jethalal and others and takes Bhogilal's side. Jetha explains to him the entire scenario and proven Pandey Ji the video. What will happen next? Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.description:

YOVAN HARJAI HAIO kAISE HO MILAN BAANKE PIYA SE JAAN MERI ATKI

(RAP)PATATI PATAH PATAANTIKYU TU ITNA BANTIGHANA ATTITUDE GHAMANDIPAR BANEGI TU MERI BANDIKYUKI NAZAROON MAI JABSE TU AATKI ATKIBHUDDHI HAI MERI THODI SATKI SATKIKAMARIYA TERI MATKI MATKIDIL KARE FOOD DOON MAI FATAKI FATAKI PAR
